title: 360° Reflective Dog Collar with Safety Lock Buckle & Neoprene Padding – Adjustable Pet Collar for Puppies, Small, Medium, Large Dogs (Black, M)
features: Adjustable and Secure: Our reflective dog collars feature height-adjustable straps and secure locking buckles to ensure a perfect fit for your furry friend and provide peace of mind on walks
Comfortable Fabric: Made of high quality neoprene nylon material, including soft and comfortable neoprene filler, our dog collars guarantee optimal comfort for your pet, even after long hours of wear

Highly Visible: Designed with highly reflective stitching and reflective tape, our dog collars offer increased visibility in low light conditions, ensuring your dog is always visible to passing cars and pedestrians

Durable and Long-lasting: Made with stainless steel D-rings, our dog collars offer outstanding durability and resistance to wear and tear, ensuring that even the most active dog can stand up to the elements
Versatile Use: Suitable for daily walks, camping trips or outdoor adventures, our reflective dog collars offer extra security and visibility, making them a must-have accessory for pet owners
description: Product Description Adjustable and Reflective Dog Collar with Safety Lock, Buckle Neoprene Padding and Metal D-ring, Pet Collar for Puppies, Small, Medium, Large Dogs Ideal Personalised Dog Collar for Small Medium Large sized Dogs This dog collar with a handle is suitable for both male dogs (a he) and female dogs (a she) . It features an adjustable ring, which makes it easy to modify the size to fit your dog perfectly. Before placing an order, please measure the circumference of your dog's neck accurately. Sizes Available Length: Medium (M): 35 - 47 cm (13.8 - 18.5 inches) Large (L): 44 - 68 cm (17.3 - 26.8 inches) Width: 2.5 cm (1 inch) Reflective Stitching : This glow in the dark dog collars features two reflective threads, ensuring high visibility. When cyclists or cars are in the vicinity, the collar will reflect the light, making your dog clearly visible. Secure Locking Buckle: The safety locking buckle is designed to prevent the collar from accidentally snagging and coming off during your dog's daily activities, like playing or scrambling through bushes. At the same time, it ensures that as an owner, you can release the collar quickly and safely whenever necessary. Metal D - Ring: Our dog collars medium has a robust metal D - ring. It's ideal for attaching ID tags, charms, and leashes.This D - ring secures ID tags, reducing jangling. It helps you keep tabs on your dog without the noise distraction, making outings safer and more enjoyable for both of you. Materials: The heavy duty dog collar is crafted from nylon, with a thick layer of neoprene padding on the inner side. This padding gives the collar a soft feel, preventing any discomfort or irritation around your dog's neck. These materials make black dog collar suitable for all weather conditions.

specifications_table.Care Instructions: ‎Wipe clean with a damp cloth and air dry
